name: K2 Black Panther
description: South Korea's advanced main battle tank featuring an autoloader, in-arm hydropneumatic suspension, and top-attack missile defense. One of the most technologically sophisticated MBTs in production.

specialAbilities.name: Active Suspension System
specialAbilities.description: In-arm hydropneumatic suspension enables terrain adaptation, hull-down positioning, and firing on the move with high accuracy.

specialAbilities.name: Top-Attack Countermeasure
specialAbilities.description: Soft-kill and hard-kill systems protect against top-attack munitions like Javelin missiles.
